song.title: Nearer My God to Thee
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Nearer, my God, to Thee, Nearer to Thee; E’en though it be a cross That raiseth me, Still all my song shall be Nearer, my God, to Thee,
[B] Nearer, my God, to Thee, Nearer to Thee.
[V2] 2) Though, like a wanderer, The sun gone down, Darkness comes over me, My rest a stone; Yet in my dreams I’d be Nearer, my God, to Thee,
[V3] 3) There let the way appear, Steps unto heav’n; All that Thou sendest me, In mercy giv’n; Angels to beckon me Nearer, my God, to Thee,
[V4] 4) Then, with my waking thoughts Bright with Thy praise, Out of my stony griefs Bethel I’ll raise, So by my woes to be Nearer, my God, to Thee,
[V5] 5) There in my Father’s home, Safe and at rest, There is my Savior’s love, Perfectly blest; Age after age to be, Nearer my God to Thee,
song.author: Sarah Flower Adams
